problem id: fec1ea92
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) OR SHR(4)

examples:
  11011000 -> 01101111
  01001101 -> 00110101
  10000111 -> 00011110
  01100110 -> 10011111
  01011101 -> 01110101
  01101100 -> 10110111
  00010100 -> 01010001
  00101010 -> 10101010

query: 11110010
predicted answer: 11001111
